description: Interactive Australia map for Creatures of the Deep — fish, creatures, items, and the map monster.

intro: The Australian waters of Creatures of the Deep are filled with exotic species. Some species are difficult, but if you have already explored Costa Rica and Alaska, this should be a formality for you. Click on a fish in the side menu to see the details.
